fields.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
fields.description: Classic Roman pasta with a creamy egg sauce, crispy pancetta and pecorino romano.
fields.ingredients:
400g spaghetti
200g pancetta
4 egg yolks
100g pecorino romano
Black pepper
Salt
fields.instructions:
Boil pasta in salted water until al dente
Fry pancetta until crispy
Mix egg yolks with grated pecorino
Combine hot pasta with pancetta
Remove from heat and add egg mixture
Toss quickly and serve immediately

fields.title: Vegan Buddha Bowl
fields.description: A nourishing bowl packed with roasted vegetables, quinoa, avocado and a creamy tahini dressing.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup quinoa
1 sweet potato cubed
1 cup chickpeas drained
1 avocado sliced
2 cups baby spinach
1 cup red cabbage shredded
2 tbsp tahini
1 lemon juiced
1 tbsp maple syrup
Olive oil, salt, pepper
fields.instructions:
Cook quinoa according to package directions
Roast sweet potato and chickpeas with olive oil at 200C for 25 minutes
Make the dressing by whisking tahini, lemon juice and maple syrup
Assemble bowls with quinoa, roasted vegetables, spinach and cabbage
Top with avocado and drizzle with tahini dressing
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve

fields.title: Chocolate Lava Cake
fields.description: Decadent individual chocolate cakes with a molten centre, the ultimate dinner party showstopper.
fields.ingredients:
200g dark chocolate
200g butter
4 eggs
4 egg yolks
200g caster sugar
100g plain flour
Cocoa powder for dusting
Vanilla ice cream to serve
fields.instructions:
Preheat oven to 200C and grease 4 ramekins with butter and cocoa powder
Melt chocolate and butter together in a bowl over simmering water
Whisk eggs, egg yolks and sugar until pale and thick
Fold chocolate mixture into egg mixture
Sift in flour and fold gently
Pour into ramekins and bake for 12 minutes
Run a knife around the edge and turn out onto plates
Serve immediately with vanilla ice cream

fields.title: 15-Minute Chicken Stir Fry
fields.description: Quick and flavourful weeknight stir fry with tender chicken, crisp vegetables and a savvy ginger soy sauce.
fields.ingredients:
500g chicken breast sliced
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp ginger grated
2 garlic cloves minced
1 red pepper sliced
1 cup broccoli florets
2 spring onions chopped
Vegetable oil
Rice to serve
fields.instructions:
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce and sesame oil in a bowl
Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Stir fry chicken for 3-4 minutes until cooked through
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute
Add vegetables and stir fry for 3 minutes
Pour over sauce and toss everything together
Garnish with spring onions and serve with rice

fields.title: Greek Salad
fields.description: Bright and refreshing Mediterranean salad with ripe tomatoes, cucumbers, olives and crumbled feta.
fields.ingredients:
4 ripe tomatoes chopped
1 cucumber chopped
1 red onion thinly sliced
200g feta cheese crumbled
100g kalamata olives
2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
1 tbsp red wine vinegar
1 tsp dried oregano
Salt and pepper
fields.instructions:
Chop tomatoes and cucumber into chunky pieces
Thinly slice the red onion
Combine tomatoes, cucumber and onion in a large bowl
Add olives and crumbled feta
Drizzle with olive oil and red wine vinegar
Sprinkle with oregano, salt and pepper
Toss gently and serve immediately

fields.title: Homemade Sourdough Bread
fields.description: Artisan crusty sourdough bread with a beautifully open crumb, worth every minute of the wait.
fields.ingredients:
500g strong bread flour
375ml water
100g active sourdough starter
10g salt
fields.instructions:
Mix flour and water and leave to rest for 30 minutes
Add sourdough starter and salt and mix well
Perform stretch and fold every 30 minutes for 2 hours
Shape the dough and place in a floured banneton
Refrigerate overnight for 8-12 hours
Preheat oven to 250C with a dutch oven inside
Bake covered for 20 minutes then uncovered for 25 minutes
Cool completely on a wire rack before slicing

fields.title: Caesar Salad
fields.description: The ultimate classic Caesar salad with crunchy croutons, crisp romaine lettuce and a tangy homemade dressing.
fields.ingredients:
2 heads romaine lettuce
100g parmesan shaved
2 slices bread for croutons
2 tbsp olive oil
2 garlic cloves
2 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp worcestershire sauce
1 tsp dijon mustard
Salt and pepper
fields.instructions:
Cut bread into cubes and toss with olive oil and garlic
Bake croutons at 180C for 10 minutes until golden
Make dressing by whisking mayonnaise, lemon juice, worcestershire and mustard
Tear romaine into pieces and place in a large bowl
Add dressing and toss to coat
Top with croutons and shaved parmesan
Season with black pepper and serve immediately
